Alternate strategy: Use the remediation script: The rule suggests using:

```
if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core && rpm --quiet -q libpwquality; then
    var_password_pam_minclass='3'
    if grep -sq minclass /etc/security/pwquality.conf.d/*.conf ; then
        sed -i "/minclass/d" /etc/security/pwquality.conf.d/*.conf
    fi
    # ...
    printf '%s = %s\n' "$stripped_key" "$var_password_pam_minclass" >> /etc/security/pwquality.conf
fi
```
